extracted.title: TE Pipeline Conditions for 1/26/2026
extracted.description:
For Gas Day January 26, 2026, Texas Eastern (TE) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to TE's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding TE's operational capacity:

Restricted Locations
North of Berne
Meter 75919 Deliveries
Leidy Line Receipts
Armaugh Uncollapsed
Shermansdale/Chambersburg
Grantville/East of Eagle
Lambertville
Linden
Chester Junction 1A1
Chester Junction 1A
TE/AGT Lease (To Lease Capacity)
Nexus/TE Leased Meters (To Lease Capacity)
30" South of Berne
Berne South
Danville South (Planned Outage)
Tompkinsville South
Barton South
24"
Sarahsville South
Five Points South
Lebanon
Lebanon Lateral
Batesville South
Deliveries to Meter 74215
Access Area
New Roads South
White Castle South
Union Church
Longview
Huntsville
Speaks
Angleton West (Planned Outage)
Opelousas
East Golden Pass
Receipts at Meter 76609
Deliveries to the Castor Line

TABS Pool Restrictions - Tolerances
TABS Pool - Length: 1% or 1,000 (ETX, STX, WLA, ELA, M1-24", M1-30", M2-24", M2-30", M3)
TABS Pool - Short: 1% or 1,000 (ETX, STX, WLA, ELA, M1-24", M1-30", M2-24", M2-30", M3)

OFO / Imbalance Notice
OFO: No DP - M1-24, M1-30, ELA, WLA, STX, ETX issued 1/23/26. 250 Dth / 5% Tolerance
OFO: No DP - M2-24, M2-30 and M3 effective 1/23/26. 250 Dth / 2% Tolerance
Customer Specific OFO: ---
Imbalance Warnings: Stay Balanced - M1-24, M1-30 and Access Area
FERC Order 698: M2-24, M2-30 and M3

(1) Beginning Gas Day December 4, 2025 TETCO will begin restricting delivery nominations at MR 74215 - TEXAS GAS TRANSMISSION LLC - LEBANON, OH to the designed meter capacity of 250,000 Dth/d.
(2) Due to gas quality issues, meter 76609 has been shut in and physical receipts at the meter will be unavailable until further notice. Beginning during the Timely cycle for Gas Day December 6, 2025, and until further notice, TE will restrict receipt nominations at Meter 76609 to -0- Dth/d.
(3) Due to the planned outages on TE's 30" system, beginning Gas Day January 17, 2026, TE anticipates restrictions of approximately 0-5% of P1 nominations at Danville.
(4) TETLP is monitoring nominations through Gillis and Opelousas and may need to make restrictions in the event the system is at its operational capacity at these stations.

Due to current TETLP system operating conditions and limited capacity on lateral 15-H, TE is scheduling receipt nominations to approximately 220,000 Dth/d at meter 75660 - UGI APPALACHIA -DRY RIDGE-GREENE CO.,PA(D)73660/(R)73661 until further notice. TETLP will continue to monitor system operations and nominated receipt volumes for future gas days.

Due to gas quality issues, meter 75973 will be scheduled to -0- until further notice.

If customers/point operators do not manage hourly takes from the system, it will lead to delivery pressures being lower than desired for this area. As a result, TE may be required to impose further restrictions or courses of action in order to maintain the operational integrity of the system, including but not limited to, implementation of flow control at specific delivery meter locations.

TE may be required to issue hourly OFO's to impose further restrictions in order to maintain the operational integrity of the system.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
